headings.usage: Use for 'Sign In', 'Welcome', and Partner Names.

body.usage: All input labels, help text, and links.

dynamic_partner.description: The left panel of the Auth screen MUST use the partner's primary color dynamically.
dynamic_partner.text_contrast_rule: Calculate contrast or default to white text on colored backgrounds. If color is light, use dark text.

css_keyframes: @keyframes slideUpFade { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
@keyframes scaleIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }

gateway.layout: Flexbox centered, h-screen, bg-white (or subtle .aa-bg). Minimalist.

components.name: PartnerCodeCard
components.style: w-full max-w-md bg-white p-10 rounded-2xl shadow-none md:shadow-xl border-0 md:border md:border-slate-100

elements.style: h-12 text-lg tracking-wide text-center uppercase placeholder:normal-case
w-full mt-6 h-12 text-base font-semibold shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95
block text-center mt-6 text-sm text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors

auth.layout: Grid (1 col mobile, 2 cols desktop). h-screen.

left_panel.style: hidden md:flex flex-col justify-between p-12 text-white relative overflow-hidden
left_panel.dynamic_bg: Use inline style for backgroundColor: partner.primaryColor
left_panel.content: Partner Logo (top left), Partner Name (large, bottom left). pattern/texture overlay (optional opacity-10).

right_panel.style: flex flex-col justify-center p-8 md:p-16 bg-white relative

floating_pill.location: Absolute bottom-6 right-6 (or centered bottom on mobile)
floating_pill.style: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer

images.description: Subtle white geometric structure for backgrounds if needed.

implementation_instructions.step_1: Create the Gateway Screen. Use a clean, centered layout. Focus on the input field interaction (ring expansion).
implementation_instructions.step_2: Create the Auth Screen. Implement the split layout. Ensure the left panel accepts a dynamic `style={{ backgroundColor: partnerColor }}`.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Implement the 'Partner Pill' at the bottom of the Auth form. It must allow switching back to step 1.
implementation_instructions.step_4: Add the CSS keyframes for 'slideUpFade' in the global CSS or as a Tailwind plugin.
implementation_instructions.step_5: Ensure all `data-testid` attributes are present exactly as listed.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the Partner Brand Panel; use solid dynamic color.
Ensure high contrast for text on the dynamic panel.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click (`active:scale-95`). Inputs should have a smooth ring transition.
Use `Manrope` for headings and `Inter` for body text.
Keep it minimal. No extra marketing text.
